Home › Seminole County › Sanford › Pescatarian Restaurants

Pescatarian Restaurants in Sanford

4 restaurants with pescatarian options in Sanford, every one graded from its most recent Florida DBPR inspection. 2 currently hold an A, on an average 4.5-star diner rating.

4 pescatarian restaurants

  • A 99 K
    KONA POKE Sushi ★ 4.8 (1007) Sanford · Seminole County VeganVeg +7 more Inspected Feb 2026
  • A 99 M
    MR AND MRS CRAB SEAFOOD SANFORD INC Seafood ★ 4.5 (1752) Sanford · Seminole County GFDF +3 more Inspected Dec 2025
  • B 89 M
    MILLER'S ORLANDO ALE HOUSE American ★ 4.2 (3376) Sanford · Seminole County KetoPesc. Inspected Nov 2025
  • B 85 O
    OLIVE GARDEN ITALIAN RESTAURANT #1526 Italian ★ 4.3 (2875) Sanford · Seminole County VegGF +2 more Inspected Feb 2026
